sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, name CLOB, value DECIMAL(10, 2));
SELECT id, substring(name, 1, value * 2) AS computed_name FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (substring(name, 3, 4) * 2) AS multiplied_substring FROM test_table HAVING multiplied_substring > 8;
SELECT t1.id, t1.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table t2 WHERE t2.value IS NOT NULL) AS total_count FROM test_table t1 WHERE substring(t1.name, 1, 3) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, substring(name, 2, 3) AS name_part FROM test_table WHERE name_part * 0 = 0;
CREATE TABLE another_table (item_id INT, description CLOB NOT NULL, amount DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00);
SELECT t1.id, substring(t1.name, CAST(t1.value AS INT), 3) AS substring_casted FROM test_table t1 JOIN another_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.item_id WHERE t2.amount > 50;
CREATE TABLE temp_table (temp_id INT, temp_name CLOB);
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT id, substring(name, 1, 5 * 2) FROM test_table;
SELECT temp_name, COUNT(*) FROM temp_table GROUP BY temp_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
